title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
